section.heading: Reports by carriers, lessors, and associations

subsection.heading: Filing of Reports.—
subsection.content: The Board may require pipeline carriers, lessors, and associations, or classes of them as the Board may prescribe, to file annual, periodic, and special reports with the Board containing answers to questions asked by it.

subsection.heading: Under Oath.—
subsection.content: Any report under this section shall be made under oath.

note.heading: Prior Provisions
note.p: Provisions similar to those in this section were contained in section 11145 of this title prior to the general amendment of this subtitle by Pub. L. 104–88, § 102(a).

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section effective Jan. 1, 1996, except as otherwise provided in Pub. L. 104–88, see section 2 of Pub. L. 104–88, set out as a note under section 1301 of this title.
